Hire me to help you keep your yard in pristine shape and for other odd jobs too!

Book a Service

Hi, I'm James!

I am a rising 7th grader at D'Evelyn Junior High. Hire me to help you keep your yard in pristine shape and for other odd jobs too. Check out my offerings or get in touch if you're looking for any other help around the house.

Our Services & Pricing

Watering Plants

$10 - $20

Going on vacation or short on time? We will keep your flowers, gardens, and lawns perfectly hydrated.

Weeding & Clean-Up

$15 - $25/hr

Don't let weeds take over your garden beds. We carefully pull weeds by hand to keep things looking pristine.

Raking & Debris Removal

$15 - $25/hr

From stray twigs to leftover leaves and grass clippings, we rake up and bag debris to tidy things up.

Dog Walking

$10 - $15/walk

Away for the weekend? Have a long day at work? We will take your pup out for a long walk so you don't have to!
